# JSValueMakeSymbol(_:_:)

**Function**

Creates a JavaScript value of the symbol type.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSValueMakeSymbol(_ ctx: JSContextRef!, _ description: JSStringRef!) -> JSValueRef!
```

## Parameters

- **ctx**: The execution context to use.
- **description**: A description of the newly created symbol value.

## Return Value

A unique [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] of the symbol type with a description that matches `description`.

## Creating Values

- **JSValueMakeUndefined(_:)**: Creates a JavaScript value of the undefined type.
- **JSValueMakeNull(_:)**: Creates a JavaScript value of the null type.
- **JSValueMakeBoolean(_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript Boolean value.
- **JSValueMakeNumber(_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript value of the number type.
- **JSValueMakeString(_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript value of the string type.
